signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Consensus Forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual consumer price inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by higher oil prices amid Middle East tensions, but undershot market expectations of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel price caps and food vouchers that contained the rise.[1][2][3] Monthly CPI
